# zabbix_media_type_webhook (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix webhook media type (notification channel via JavaScript).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the media type. Must be unique within Zabbix.
- `script` (String) JavaScript body of the webhook.

### Optional

- `attempt_interval` (String) Interval between delivery attempts (e.g. `10s`, `1m`). Defaults to `10s`.
- `description` (String) Description of the media type.
- `event_menu_name` (String) Label for the event menu entry. Used when `show_event_menu` is `true`.
- `event_menu_url` (String) URL for the event menu entry. Used when `show_event_menu` is `true`.
- `max_attempts` (Number) Maximum number of delivery attempts. Defaults to `3`.
- `max_sessions` (Number) Maximum number of concurrent sessions. Defaults to `1`.
- `message_templates` (Attributes List) Per-event-source notification templates. If unset, Zabbix defaults are used. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--message_templates))
- `parameters` (Attributes List) Key/value pairs passed to the webhook script. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--parameters))
- `process_tags` (Boolean) Whether to add event tags from webhook response. Defaults to `false`.
- `show_event_menu` (Boolean) Whether to add a link to the event menu. Defaults to `false`.
- `status` (String) Whether the media type is active. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `enabled`.
- `timeout` (String) Script execution timeout (e.g. `30s`). Defaults to `30s`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the media type.

<a id="nestedatt--message_templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `message_templates`

Required:

- `eventsource` (Number) Event source: 0=triggers, 1=discovery, 2=autoregistration, 3=internal, 4=services.
- `message` (String) Message body.
- `recovery` (Number) Recovery: 0=operations, 1=recovery, 2=update.
- `subject` (String) Message subject.


<a id="nestedatt--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parameters`

Required:

- `name` (String) Parameter name.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Parameter value. Sensitive.
